allow: PowerShell(if \($env:GITHUB_TOKEN\) { "GITHUB_TOKEN env var is set" } else { "GITHUB_TOKEN env var not set" })

PowerShell($candidates = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path $c\) { "Found: $c" } })
PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; & $gh project list --owner gbahns 2>&1)
PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; & $gh auth status 2>&1; "---"; & $gh project list --owner gbahns 2>&1)

PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; "=== PROJECT VIEW ==="; & $gh project view 1 --owner gbahns; "`n=== FIELDS ==="; & $gh project field-list 1 --owner gbahns; "`n=== ITEMS ==="; & $gh project item-list 1 --owner gbahns --limit 100)

PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; $q = 'query { user\(login: "gbahns"\) { projectV2\(number: 1\) { fields\(first: 30\) { nodes { ... on ProjectV2SingleSelectField { name options { id name } } } } } } }'; & $gh api graphql -f query=$q)
PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; & $gh issue view 24 --repo gbahns/ValheimMods)
